headline: EMCOR (EME) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: For today's call, Tony will provide comments on our fourth quarter and full year and discuss our RPOs.  Jason will then review the fourth quarter and full year numbers, then turn it back to Tony to discuss our guidance before we open it up for Q&A. Before we begin, a quick reminder that this presentation and discussion contains certain forward-looking statements and may contain certain non-GAAP financial information.
